program.name: DevKofi AI-Powered MERN Stack Mentorship
program.subtitle: Engineering-first mentorship to help you ship production MERN apps with AI integrated across planning, coding, debugging, testing, and deployment.
program.promise: Learn how real engineers use AI as a multiplier while keeping architecture, code quality, and shipping discipline high.

guarantee.title: 14-day confidence guarantee
guarantee.details: If it’s not the right fit in your first 14 days, you can request a refund.

plans.title: Standard
plans.tagline: Structured mentorship for consistent AI-powered MERN execution.
plans.summary: Build production-grade MERN projects while learning practical AI workflow integration.
whoItsFor: Developers transitioning from tutorials to shipping real apps
Founders building product MVPs with MERN
outcomes: Plan features and scope work with AI support
Ship full-stack MERN features with strong debugging habits
Write cleaner docs, tests, and deployment checklists
includes: AI workflow training for planning → shipping
plans.recommendedFor: Developers who need structure and practical execution support

plans.title: Pro
plans.tagline: High-accountability mentorship with deeper code and architecture feedback.
plans.summary: Everything in Standard plus faster support, deeper review loops, and direct architecture mentoring.
whoItsFor: Engineers shipping serious portfolio or startup work
Developers who need strong external accountability
Builders preparing for technical interviews or product launch
outcomes: Build review-ready repositories and architecture decisions
Develop confidence in AI-assisted engineering judgment
includes: Deeper code reviews and refactor feedback
Priority support and tighter accountability cadence

availability.note: Limited seats with manual review and activation.

plans.recommendedFor: Developers and founders who need high-accountability shipping support

plans.title: Team / Enterprise
plans.tagline: AI-powered MERN workflow training for teams shipping production software.
plans.summary: Upskill your team with practical AI-enhanced MERN engineering systems and delivery discipline.
whoItsFor: Teams needing better code review and debugging practices
outcomes: Higher code quality and review standards
includes: Practical AI-assisted planning and delivery sessions
plans.recommendedFor: Teams that want better engineering output with AI-enabled workflows
